title: SpiritVale Patch Note
description: Schema for a single SpiritVale patch note file (patches/v*.json and patches/latest.json).

title.description: Human-readable patch name, e.g. 'The Echoing Spire'

current.description: true on the latest version only — drives the 'Latest' badge in /patch/ viewer

url.description: Claude artifact URL for interactive notes, or null if not yet published

added.description: New features and content added in this patch

removed.description: Features or content removed in this patch

deprecated.description: Features marked for future removal — still present but no longer recommended

steam_news_id.description: Steam AppNews GID — stable unique ID for the upstream Steam news item

steam_url.description: Canonical Steam news URL — verifiable upstream source for this patch announcement; null if not sourced from Steam

released_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the Steam news publish date, e.g. '2026-05-25T01:00:00+00:00'

affects.description: Systems, classes, or content areas affected — e.g. ['Paladin', 'crafting', 'UI']. Enables filtered display in the patch viewer.

breaking.description: true if this patch breaks save compatibility or requires a client reinstall — displayed as a warning badge in the viewer

raw_body.description: Plain-text Steam news body — present in auto-generated drafts only; remove before merging to production

entry_ids.description: Stable anchor IDs for each bullet entry, keyed by section name. Each ID follows the pattern '{version}-{type}-{index}' (e.g. 'v0.17.0-added-2'). Used for deep-linking to specific changes via /patch/{version}#{id} or ?focus={id}.

entry_tags.description: Explicit per-bullet tags keyed by entry_id (e.g. 'v0.17.0-changed-3': ['balance','autocast']). Merged with auto-extracted keyword tags in search-index.json. Use for semantic categories that keyword extraction cannot infer (e.g. 'balance', 'nerf', 'buff', 'equipment', 'economy').
